user.title: Enova Power

abort.account_mismatch: The credentials are for a different Enova Power account

init.title: Enova Power options
init.description: Cost is estimated from the energy line item only (excludes delivery, regulatory charges, rebates and tax). Cost is currently computed for Time-of-Use.
